The call spelling is exactly `using Identifier` for forwarding or `using conformance(Type conforms Trait)` for the root coherence bridge. Calls, literals, member chains, stored values, and every other computed expression after using are rejected.

display_name: Explicit witness argument minimum sound profile
notes: `using Identifier` forwards one explicit witness parameter; `using conformance(Type conforms Trait)` selects the unique visible coherent nominal conformance at a root call. Both are borrowed non-first-class evidence and cannot escape, be forged, stored, or computed as ordinary values.

The only source witness declaration is an explicit `using name: witness Trait<T>` parameter. It is a borrowed, non-forgeable, non-storable, non-returnable, non-capturable evidence channel; product support remains NOT_RUN.

display_name: Explicit witness parameter narrow Stable law
notes: Explicit witness evidence is admitted only in its parameter declaration and the matching using call channel. Return, binding/field storage, capture, container insertion, and ordinary-argument use are rejected before ordinary type compatibility is considered.

display_name: Extension and conformance resolution identity law
notes: Extension lookup and witness lookup are disjoint. Conformance presence never changes the lookup domain of the same call spelling; source/import/use order is never a tie-breaker.
